title: Causative HAVE / GET Something Done
description: HAVE / GET something done means you arrange for someone else to do the action.
summary_pt_br: HAVE / GET + objeto + particípio = mandar fazer. 'I had my car repaired' = o mecânico consertou.

scenes.subtitle_en: HAVE / GET something done means you arrange for someone else to do the action.
scenes.subtitle_pt: HAVE / GET + objeto + particípio = mandar fazer. 'I had my car repaired' = o mecânico consertou.

scenes.text_en: HAVE / GET something done means you arrange for someone else to do the action. Today's focus: causative have / get something done. I had my laptop fixed at the store.
scenes.text_pt: HAVE / GET + objeto + particípio = mandar fazer. 'I had my car repaired' = o mecânico consertou. Foco de hoje: causative have / get something done. Mandei consertar o notebook na loja.

scenes.title: Causative HAVE / GET Something Done
scenes.body_en: Pattern: HAVE / GET + object + past participle. 'I had my car repaired.' = a mechanic did it. Use for professional services, delegation, or when the actor is not important.
scenes.body_pt: HAVE / GET + objeto + particípio = mandar fazer. 'I had my car repaired' = o mecânico consertou.

examples.en: I had my laptop fixed at the store.
examples.pt: Mandei consertar o notebook na loja.

examples.en: She is getting her hair cut tomorrow.
examples.pt: Ela vai cortar o cabelo amanhã (no salão).

examples.en: We had the contract reviewed by a lawyer.
examples.pt: A gente mandou um advogado revisar o contrato.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Causative HAVE / GET Something Done

exercise.question: Complete: "I had my ___ fixed at the store."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I had my laptop fixed at the store."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Mandei consertar o notebook na loja.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
She is getting her hair cut tomorrow.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "She is getting her hair cut tomorrow."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ela vai cortar o cabelo amanhã (no salão).

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Causative HAVE / GET Something Done — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre causative have / get something done. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, how do you manage all your projects at once?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have most of the admin work done by my assistant.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Smart. Do you handle the design yourself?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I had the landing page designed by a freelancer.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I had the contracts reviewed by a lawyer last week.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am getting a new desk installed tomorrow.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I used to do everything myself and burned out.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lesson learned the hard way. Good for you.

scenes.title: How Joca runs his startup
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write what Joca delegates and what he keeps for himself. Use at least three causative structures.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Two years into his startup, Joca finally understood that he couldn't do everything alone.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I have my legal work handled by a small law firm that I trust completely.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: And the product design? Do you do that yourself?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: No, I had the interface designed by a specialist from Lisbon last month.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I even get my groceries delivered now, just to save an hour a week.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Delegation turned out to be the most important skill in his entrepreneurial toolkit.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Causative HAVE / GET Something Done". HAVE / GET something done means you arrange for someone else to do the action. I had my laptop fixed at the store. She is getting her hair cut tomorrow. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Causative HAVE / GET Something Done". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Causative HAVE / GET Something Done".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Causative HAVE / GET Something Done".

scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
